creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
Carlo jumped the gun.  Before this can be considered "patch-ready", we need to see some verification about it's quality.  Unless Carlo wants to assign the port to himself at his own risk:

 In order of preference, examples of what I'm looking for are:

1) "poudriere testport" or "poudriere bulk -t" logs
2) Redports or tinderbox logs
3) "make check-plist" followed by "make stage-qa" output  (https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/porting-testing.html)

Also, please run "portlint" and paste the output.
